title: ProofX | Directed Search For Number Theory Experiments
description: ProofX is a research toolkit for directed counterexample search, reproducible ledgers, and bounded computational experiments in number theory.
og_title: ProofX | Directed Search For Number Theory Experiments
og_description: Open Python tooling for candidate ranking, search ledgers, and bounded experiments around Collatz, Goldbach, and Riemann-adjacent diagnostics.
